summary: Update mode testing complete. Updated existing tests for new Modern Dark UI redesign and added new tests for Route History with MongoDB integration. All 18 frontend tests passed (13 original + 5 new), all 15 backend tests passed.
seed_data_creation: Test routes created dynamically with TEST_ prefix, cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test suite updated for Modern Dark UI redesign. Tests cover: 1) Core flows (header, navigation, tabs), 2) 3D Map simulation with auto-save toggle, 3) Route History CRUD operations with MongoDB. API /api/routes/demo/generate is MOCKED - returns static demo data.

backend_tests: test_root_endpoint - Root API returns version info
test_get_single_doc - Single doc content loads with HTML
test_demo_route_generate - Demo route has required fields
test_delete_nonexistent_route - Error handling for missing route
test_post_position - Drone position POST updates correctly

core-flows.spec.ts: App loads with header and navigation
Navigation tabs visible and 3D Map active by default
Tab navigation switches between views (including History)
About section displays project info and specs
map-simulation.spec.ts: New route button loads new route from API
Map stats display keyframes and distance
Auto-save toggle is visible and functional
route-history.spec.ts: API: List routes endpoint returns array
API: Save and delete route via API
UI: Enable auto-save and save route
UI: Route History page displays saved routes

mocked_api_note: /api/routes/demo/generate returns static demo route data (not real flight data) - as expected per requirements
